title: Ice Cream in the Capital District
tagline: Community-researched map of ice cream in the capital district

intent.statement: Document high-confidence, location-accurate ice cream and gelato destinations in New York's Capital District with product-centered visual evidence.
intent.scope: Albany, Troy, Schenectady, Saratoga Springs, and nearby communities within the declared coordinate bounds.
intent.photoPolicy: Prefer verified product photos (scoops/cones/sundaes) and avoid storefront-only imagery.

intentHistory.author: codex
intentHistory.summary: Established explicit map intent and photo evidence policy for quality enforcement.
